title: polystichum × subalpinum
intro: Polystichum × subalpinum, a sterile hybrid of the Polystichum lonchitis and Polystichum braunii fern species, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polystichum × subalpinum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's fronds are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
